description: Preference-adjusted visibility gaps for global-compatible and local-Europe groups.
Shows whether country-level visibility gaps may be entangled with genre composition rather than only national origin.
caveat: Genre labels overlap; shares are diagnostic rather than causal.

description: Ranks the strongest negative country-level visibility gaps among support-passing countries.
caveat: Low-support country labels are kept out of the main ranking to avoid overclaiming.

description: Interactive map of mean country prominence gap, used as supplementary HTML evidence.
caveat: Interactive output depends on browser support and Plotly CDN access.

description: Country-border choropleth showing which European production countries fall below the user-adjusted visibility target.
caveat: Grey countries are map context or below the scorecard support threshold.

description: Country-border choropleth showing mean discounted Top-20 exposure by production country.
caveat: Country labels are production-country proxies and may include co-productions.
